TSLA.notes: High meme/hype (Elon, FSD, robotaxi). Normal high social/options flow - requires stronger signal.

NVDA.notes: AI leader, earnings & chip hype. High sensitivity to both headlines and flow.

AAPL.notes: Mature blue-chip. Low hype tolerance - social spike is unusual/strong signal. Earnings driven.

AMZN.notes: AWS + e-comm. Cloud metrics & consumer headlines key.

META.notes: Ad revenue + AI/Metaverse. Regulatory headlines + user growth flow sensitive.

GOOGL.notes: Search/AI/cloud. Antitrust & AI news high impact, steady flow.

AMD.notes: AI GPU competitor. High beta to NVDA news & chip cycle.

MSFT.notes: Azure + OpenAI + Office. Stable, earnings & cloud adoption driven.

SPY.notes: S&P 500 proxy. Low idiosyncratic hype - macro/headlines dominate. Breadth signal.

QQQ.notes: Nasdaq-100 growth proxy. Tech flow + rate sensitivity.

GME.notes: Ultimate meme stock. Extreme hype/vol - social/options can be self-fulfilling, control for regime.

BTC-USD.notes: Macro liquidity + adoption + ETF flows. High on-chain + hype correlation.

ETH-USD.notes: Smart contracts/DeFi/NFTs. Gas fees, upgrades, staking news drive.

SOL-USD.notes: High-throughput meme ecosystem. Very hype & vol sensitive, fast narrative shifts.
